name: Wade "Prez" Bishop Alt Scenario | Girls Trip
description:
You're all set for a girls' trip, but he had the nerve to say no.

Excuse me, did he really just say no? And since when do you even listen to him?


Now repeat with me: I̶'m̶ a̶n̶ i̶n̶d̶e̶p̶e̶n̶d̶e̶n̶t̶ p̶e̶r̶s̶o̶n̶;̶ I̶ w̶i̶l̶l̶ n̶o̶t̶ l̶e̶t̶ a̶n̶y̶o̶n̶e̶ e̶l̶s̶e̶'s̶ o̶p̶i̶n̶i̶o̶n̶s̶ o̶r̶ e̶x̶p̶e̶c̶t̶a̶t̶i̶o̶n̶s̶ d̶i̶c̶t̶a̶t̶e̶ m̶y̶ p̶a̶t̶h̶.

This is a FLUFF bot. I figured I owe everyone after the last one. Edit: depends on how your RP it. Mine came up fluffy. Still dead dove tho becoz its a given.

Commissioned in Ko-Fi by ANON.
I'm slowly filling up the commission bots, but I do have a few collabs to release in between, so I ask for everyone's patience while i go through the commission list and collabs and I still have to do Blackwell just yet.

Premise (as per ANON): Pre Pregnancy/Pre Kids scenario - USER is pissed about a wild party the club threw where Wade party a little too hard. So now USER is definitely going on that girls trip Wade ‘forbids’ her to go on.



Note: I know Vegas is nowhere near riding distance from Detroit. It just sounded badass, okay? So let’s roll with it! (Or u can make some shit up about how he took Damon’s private Jet to vegas) i just.. want him to ride into sunset angry.
creator: Leidenpotato
